blockPatterns.name: stringLiteral
blockPatterns.description: Select a single or double quoted string literal

blockPatterns.name: templateLiteral
blockPatterns.description: Select a template literal string including backticks

blockPatterns.name: jsxElement
blockPatterns.description: Select an entire JSX element including opening and closing tags

blockPatterns.name: jsxAttributeValue
blockPatterns.description: Select a JSX attribute value (string or expression)

blockPatterns.name: functionParameters
blockPatterns.description: Select the parameters inside a function's parentheses

blockPatterns.name: classNameString
blockPatterns.description: Select the full className attribute value

blockPatterns.name: cnArguments
blockPatterns.description: Select the arguments inside a cn() utility call

blockPatterns.name: cvaVariantValues
blockPatterns.description: Select the variant values object inside a cva() config

blockPatterns.name: objectProperty
blockPatterns.description: Select a single object property (key: value pair)

blockPatterns.name: arrayElement
blockPatterns.description: Select a single element within an array literal

blockPatterns.name: typeAnnotation
blockPatterns.description: Select a TypeScript type annotation after a colon

blockPatterns.name: genericType
blockPatterns.description: Select the type parameters inside angle brackets

blockPatterns.name: importSpecifiers
blockPatterns.description: Select the named import specifiers within an import statement

blockPatterns.name: formFieldBlock
blockPatterns.description: Select an entire FormField component block including children
